title: Christian Dart Gumshoe
description: Christian Dart returns with his acclaimed, sell-out EdFringe 2025 show GUMSHOE! A grizzled New York Detective embarks on his final, most deadly and most ridiculous case yet. Join Gumshoe as he attempts to solve the unsolvable case. Who did the whodunnit?! Written and performed by award-winning comedian Christian Dart. Best Show: Leicester Comedy Fest 2025 - Nominee, Finalist: Sketch-Off! 2025 ★★★★★ "He is likely the next BIG thing! - GetTheChance ★★★★★ "A joy to witness!" - ThreeWeeks ★★★★★ "I spent pretty much the entire show in stitches!" - A Youngish Perspective ★★★★★ "I absolutely LOVED Gumshoe!" - The Live Review ★★★★★ "Will have you in stitches! Case closed" - Adventures In Theatreland ★★★★★ "Our faces hurt from laughing" - Number9 ★★★★★ "Amazing!" - TonyLovesTheFringe ★★★★★ "A comedy shotgun to the face!" - AaronSays
